headline: RTX Balances Rising Defense Demand With Hybrid Electric Aviation Progress
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) is in focus after a significant geopolitical escalation in the Middle East involving the US, Israel, and Iran drove renewed global interest in air and missile defense systems. The company’s Patriot and related defense platforms are drawing attention as governments review air defense needs and award new contracts, including fresh orders linked to the UAE. RTX also reported progress in sustainable aviation, successfully operating its hybrid-electric propulsion system at full...

headline: Gabelli Likes Lockheed, RTX, Boeing — and a Small Supplier You’ve Never Heard Of
summary: Mario Gabelli is looking at the defense sector and seeing a multi-year, capital-intensive buildout across the entire missile supply chain. He’s not just buying the obvious names. “Anyone that’s producing missile rocket engines, seeker heads — Lockheed, RTX, Raytheon, Boeing all make the sort of the main parts of the missile. headline: China's Heavy Rare Earth Alloys Influence over West's Industrial Security Supply Chain
summary: In October 2025, a high-stakes geopolitical standoff revealed a significant vulnerability in Western industrial security. Analysis of the late 2025 tariff negotiations between Washington and Beijing suggests a specific sequence of events has highlighted how deeply dependent the U.S. remains on a single geopolitical rival for the materials that power its most advanced technologies. Companies mentioned in this release include: REalloys Inc. (ALOY), Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT), RTX Corp
